title: Shrek's Swamp Background
description: Changes the Minecraft menu background to be Shrek's swamp.
body:
**This texture pack changes the Minecraft menu background to be Shrek's swamp.**

![Main menu screenshot](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/LPstz8dW/images/f84a85a032da96b02f66bdd84a209f8359128bff.png)

![If you want all the mods and texture packs you see in the images, click the link to go to my modpack](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/oeJ2xduz/images/be6345f6b2cec4d2f55faf49cbc740af90573161.png)

**https://modrinth.com/modpack/funkyzpros-pack**
